description: Nacelle E-stop does not trigger immediate shutdown during safety test. Repeated twice with same result; turbine remains in run-ready state.
Tower access door opens but interlock status remains 'closed' in controller. Safety chain status becomes inconsistent and blocks safe service mode.
Rotor lock indication clears without manual release action. Event recorded during maintenance and may create unsafe rotation risk if not contained.
Lift emergency alarm button does not register in system diagnostics. No alarm signal received in safety monitoring while lift is powered on.
Fire detection reports intermittent sensor fault and toggles between OK/fault. Requires inspection due to potential loss of fire detection coverage.
Yaw brake safety feedback fluctuates during idle operation. System occasionally flags unsafe condition and requests manual verification.
Pitch emergency stop command executes with noticeable delay in logs. Delay exceeds expected timing and may reduce safety response margin.
Overspeed protection self-test fails after power cycle. Protective function not confirmed and turbine is held in restricted state.

summary: Turbine fails to start after reset
description: After reset, turbine stays in blocked startup state. Local controller logs show an internal state mismatch preventing transition to normal sequence.

summary: Frequent stop due to sensor plausibility
description: Controller stops turbine citing sensor plausibility check failure. Signal values look within range but plausibility logic flags mismatch repeatedly.
Local controller applies derate without active alarm conditions. Power setpoint reduced unexpectedly and does not recover after clearing warnings.
Yaw control does not correct wind direction offset over time. Controller reports yaw active but nacelle position remains unchanged in trend.
Pitch calibration completes but values revert after restart. Local controller appears to reject stored parameters or fails to persist configuration.
Startup sequence halts at a fixed step and times out. No hardware trip observed; controller sequence logic appears to wait for missing condition.
Following local controller reboot, multiple non-critical alarms raise simultaneously. Clears after 10–15 minutes but repeats on next reboot.
Cooling control loop oscillates and causes frequent fan speed changes. Trend shows periodic overshoot and undershoot around setpoint.
Converter trips intermittently in high wind with DC link overvoltage. Fault code and timestamps captured; resets succeed but recurrence continues.
IGBT temperature rises quickly under moderate load and triggers alarm. Cooling appears active, but thermal margin reduces faster than expected.
Converter protection trips on grid overcurrent during ramp-up. Occurs sporadically and correlates with specific grid voltage fluctuations.
Converter cooling pump command is issued but feedback remains inactive. Converter enters protective derate mode to prevent overheating.
DC link pre-charge does not reach target voltage within allowed time. Converter blocks synchronization and requests manual restart.
Converter reports elevated harmonics measurement and raises compliance warning. No immediate trip, but warning persists over multiple hours.
Intermittent communication loss between converter and main controller. Causes brief production dips and sometimes transitions to safe standby.
Diagnostics indicates reduced DC link capacitor health. Ripple measurement above baseline and suggests aging or thermal stress conditions.
Monitoring dashboard fails to show live production and alarms for multiple turbines. UI loads, but data panels remain empty due to API errors.
Alarm notifications are visible in the portal but not delivered via email. SMTP integration shows intermittent failures in the notification service.
Work orders created in field tool do not sync to central system. Sync job reports conflicts and retries without completing successfully.

summary: User access denied after role change
description: User receives access denied when opening the operations app after role update. Identity appears correct but authorization cache may be stale.

summary: API latency spike on telemetry endpoint
description: Telemetry API response time increased significantly during peak hours. Requests time out intermittently and affect downstream analytics jobs.
Daily production report shows missing intervals for several assets. Raw ingestion appears delayed, causing incomplete aggregation for the period.

summary: Mobile app crashes on alarm list
description: Mobile service app crashes when opening the alarm list for a site. Crash occurs consistently on specific device OS version.
Asset metadata edits save in UI but revert after refresh. Backend returns success yet the updated values do not persist in subsequent reads.
